cause_analysis.narrative: Refined Beauty Day Spa churned on 2026-04-19 after 58 days with Zoca. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-18 via sms, client wrote: "Yeah that price is good…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-18 via sms, client wrote: "Ohh okay sruthi…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
